name: campus-attendance-suite
description: Enterprise Engineering College Attendance Management SaaS

scripts.dev: npm run dev -w apps/api & npm run dev -w apps/web
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/db && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w apps/api && npm run lint -w apps/web
